expectations.text: Response asks a small number of high-leverage clarifying questions or states explicit assumptions
expectations.evidence: Used only 6 questions or made explicit assumptions.

expectations.text: Response produces multiple architectures shaped by the resumability versus simplicity trade-off
expectations.evidence: Detected 3 options and both resumability/simplicity themes.

expectations.text: Response explains how the recommendation changes if resumability or simplicity becomes the top priority
expectations.evidence: Output explains how the recommendation changes under different priorities.

expectations.text: Response does not stop at a neutral menu of options

uncertainties: No repository or implementation code was provided, so the response stays at architecture level.
The feature includes both read-only analysis and some mutating repository actions.
Exact resumability may matter later, but is not yet confirmed as a hard requirement.
Auditability and safe retries matter, but likely below full compliance-workflow levels for v1.
